description: Track immunizations for older children and adolescents
Track vaccine boosters and follow-up doses

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE (
	IMMUNIZATION_ROUTINE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT,
	MONTH_ID BIGINT,
	BCG_VACCINE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_0_BIRTH_DOSE DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	OPV_3 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PENTAVALENT_3 DOUBLE PRECISION
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_CHILD_IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED (
	IMMUNIZATION_SPECIALIZED_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT,
	MONTH_ID BIGINT,
	ROTAVIRUS_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ROTAVIRUS_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	ROTAVIRUS_3 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IPV_1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	IPV_2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	VITAMIN_A_DOSE_1 DOUBLE PRECISION
);

description: Track immunization session planning and execution
Track antenatal care registration and basic metrics
Track maternal health testing and hemoglobin monitoring

DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_MATERNAL_VACCINES_MEDICATIONS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_MATERNAL_VACCINES_MEDICATIONS (
	MATERNAL_VACCINES_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	SUB_DISTRICT_ID BIGINT,
	MONTH_ID BIGINT,
	PW_GIVEN_TT1_TD1 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PW_GIVEN_TT2_TD2 DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PW_GIVEN_TT_BOOSTER_TD_BOOSTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PW_GIVEN_ALBENDAZOLE_AFTER_1ST_TRIMESTER DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PW_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_180_IFA_TABLETS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	PW_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_360_CALCIUM_TABLETS DOUBLE PRECISION,
	MOTHERS_PROVIDED_FULL_COURSE_180_IFA_AFTER_DELIVERY DOUBLE PRECISION
);
